prompt: List the 5 most recent videos from https://www.youtube.com/@TED

assertions.text: Output contains exactly 5 video entries (rows in a table or items in a list)
Output uses a markdown table with column headers
Each entry has a video title (non-empty text in the title column)
Each entry includes a YouTube URL
Output includes duration info for videos (MM:SS or HH:MM:SS format)
